name: Linux
description: 监控 Linux 主机基础指标，包括 CPU、内存、磁盘、网络、进程等
toml_template:
# Linux 基础监控由 categraf 内置插件自动采集
# 以下配置控制各子插件的开关

[cpu]
collect = {{.collect_cpu}}
interval = "{{.interval}}"

[mem]
collect = {{.collect_mem}}
interval = "{{.interval}}"

[disk]
collect = {{.collect_disk}}
interval = "{{.interval}}"

[net]
collect = {{.collect_net}}
interval = "{{.interval}}"
